candidate_fol: exists x.(EuropeanSoccerClub(x) -> (Attend(x, ucl) & Attend(x, uel) & Attend(x, uecl)))
(AwardedTo(turingAward, donaldKnuth) & AwardedTo(turingAward, marvinMinsky) & AwardedTo(turingAward, richardHamming) & AwardedTo(turingAward, johnMcCarthy) & AwardedTo(turingAward, alanTuring))
(Play(peter, piano) & Play(peter, violin) & Play(peter, saxophone) & Piano(piano))
exists x.(HoldingCompany(x) -> exists y.(Company(y) & Hold(x, y)))
all x.(HoldingCompany(x) -> exists y.(Company(y) & Hold(x, y) & HoldingCompany(y)))
all x.(Company(x) -> exists y.(HoldingCompany(y) & Hold(y, x)))
all x.(EuropeanSoccerClub(x) -> (Attend(x, ucl) & Attend(x, uel) & Attend(x, uecl)))
